title: Ctr Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function Ctr (BitNumber As Integer ) As Integer
parameters:
BitNumber	Number of the input bit set as a counter.

Only 16 counters can be active at the same time.
description: Returns the counter value of the specified input counter.
see_also:
CtReset

Ctr Example

VB Example:

lblCounter.Text = m_spel.Ctr(1).ToString()

C# Example:

lblCounter.Text = m_spel.Ctr(1).ToString();
